title: Raigad Fort
tagline: Raigad Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Raigad, located in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, India, is a hill fort situated near the town of Mahad.
overview.description: Raigad, located in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, India, is a hill fort situated near the town of Mahad. It is one of the strongest fortresses on the Deccan Plateau and was historically referred to as Rairee or Rairy fort. Raigad is the largest fort in Asia, with an area of 1,200 acres. Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, the Maratha ruler, along with his chief engineer Hiroji Indulkar, oversaw the construction and development of various buildings and structures at the fort.

topPlaces.name: ISKCON Temple, Pune
topPlaces.description: ISKCON New Vedic Cultural Center (NVCC), Sri Sri Radha Vrindavanchandra temple or ISKCON Pune is a Gaudiya Vaishnavism temple situated in Pune, India. The temple is dedicated to Hindu god Radha Krishna and was opened in 2013.

items.note: ISKCON New Vedic Cultural Center (NVCC), Sri Sri Radha Vrindavanchandra temple or ISKCON Pune is a Gaudiya Vaishnavism temple situated in Pune, India. The temple is dedicated to Hindu god Radha Krishna and was opened in 2013.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Raigad Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Raigad Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Raigad Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (63 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (56 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Raigad Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Raigad Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Raigad Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Raigad Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Raigad Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are ISKCON Temple, Pune.
